videos.title: FP1 Highlights | 2026 Miami Grand Prix
videos.description:
After a 5 week break, the drivers and teams got back on track at the Miami International Autodrome. Catch up on all the action from the sole practice session, as the grid prepare for Sprint Qualifying and the weekend ahead.
